question: Consider the Time class in the following code and write the body of the function prototypes given for class Time. And in main function write a line of code that creates an instance of the Time class and sets the time to 12:34:56 using the cascading technique.
driver: int main() { Time t; t.setHour(12).setMinute(34).setSecond(56); t.printUniversal(); return 0; }
errors: Missing semicolon after cascading method call on line 71
